mapper.select: /*RateGiftPrmtMapper.selectGiftPrmtMstInfo*/ SELECT PRMT_ID ,PRMT_NM ,STRT_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(STRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STRT_DT_FMT ,END_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DT_FMT ,ORGN_ID ,FN_GET_CODENM@DL_MSP('CMN0268', ORGN_ID) AS ORGN_ID_NM ,ORGN_TYPE ,FN_GET_CODENM@DL_MSP('CMN0055', ORGN_TYPE) AS ORGN_TYPE_NM ,PRMT_TYPE ,FN_GET_CODENM@DL_MSP('ORG1010', PRMT_TYPE) AS PRMT_TYPE_NM ,PRMT_TEXT ,USG_YN ,SHOW_YN ,WIRELESS_YN FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT@DL_MSP WHERE PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}

/*RateGiftPrmtMapper.selectGiftPrmtOrgnList*/ SELECT A.ORGN_ID AS CODE ,B.ORGN_NM AS NAME FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG@DL_MSP A ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP B WHERE A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY B.ORGN_NM

/*RateGiftPrmtMapper.selectGiftPrmtRateList*/ SELECT A.RATE_CD AS CODE ,B.RATE_NM AS NAME FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC@DL_MSP A ,MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY B.DATA_TYPE DESC, B.RATE_NM

/*RateGiftPrmtMapper.selectGiftPrmtOnoffList*/ SELECT A.ON_OFF_TYPE AS CODE ,B.CD_DSC AS NAME FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ONOFF@DL_MSP A ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP B WHERE A.ON_OFF_TYPE = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'RCP0007' AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY B.CD_VAL

/*RateGiftPrmtMapper.selectGiftPrmtModelList*/ SELECT A.MODEL_ID AS CODE ,B.PRDT_CODE || ' ' || B.PRDT_NM AS NAME FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_MODEL@DL_MSP A ,CMN_INTM_MDL@DL_MSP B WHERE A.MODEL_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY B.PRDT_CODE

/*RateGiftPrmtMapper.selectGiftPrmtPrdtList*/ SELECT A.PRDT_ID AS CODE ,B.PRDT_NM AS NAME ,B.USE_YN ,B.WEB_URL AS IMG_URL FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_PRDT@DL_MSP A ,MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP B WHERE A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY B.USE_YN DESC, A.SORT, B.PRDT_NM

/*RateGiftPrmtMapper.selectRateGiftPrmtXmlList*/ SELECT A.SEQ ,A.PRMT_ID ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_START_DATE ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_END_DATE ,A.GIFT_TEXT ,A.MAIN_PRDT_ID ,(SELECT PRDT_NM FROM MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP WHERE PRDT_ID = A.MAIN_PRDT_ID) AS MAIN_PRDT_NM ,(SELECT WEB_URL FROM MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP WHERE PRDT_ID = A.MAIN_PRDT_ID) AS MAIN_PRDT_IMG_URL ,A.GIFT_PRICE ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE_SEC, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_START_DATE_SEC ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_END_DATE_SEC, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_END_DATE_SEC ,A.GIFT_TEXT_SEC ,A.MAIN_PRDT_ID_SEC ,(SELECT PRDT_NM FROM MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP WHERE PRDT_ID = A.MAIN_PRDT_ID_SEC) AS MAIN_PRDT_NM_SEC ,(SELECT WEB_URL FROM MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP WHERE PRDT_ID = A.MAIN_PRDT_ID_SEC) AS MAIN_PRDT_IMG_URL_SEC ,A.GIFT_PRICE_SEC ,A.POPUP_URL ,A.POPUP_URL_MO ,(SELECT WIRELESS_YN FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT@DL_MSP WHERE PRMT_ID = A.PRMT_ID) AS WIRELESS_YN ,A.LIST_VIEW_YN ,A.LIST_VIEW_YN_SEC FROM NMCP_RATE_GIFT_PRMT A WHERE A.STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DECODE(A.INDC_ODRG, 0, 99999, A.INDC_ODRG), A.CRET_DTTM DESC

/*RateGiftPrmtMapper.selectRateAdsvcGdncProdRelXmlList*/ WITH GIFT_PRMT AS ( SELECT C.RATE_CD ,LISTAGG(A.SEQ, '|') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A.SEQ) AS GIFT_PRMT_SEQS FROM NMCP_RATE_GIFT_PRMT A ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG@DL_MSP B ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC@DL_MSP C ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT@DL_MSP D WHERE A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = D.PRMT_ID AND B.ORGN_ID = '1100011741' AND D.REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'UU' AND A.STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY C.RATE_CD ), EVENT_PRMT AS ( SELECT LISTAGG(A.EVNT_CD, '|') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A.EVNT_CD) AS EVNT_CD, LISTAGG(A.ECP_SEQ, '|') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A.ECP_SEQ) AS ECP_SEQ , B.RATE_CD FROM NMCP_EVENT_CODE_MST A, NMCP_EVENT_CODE_RATE_REL B WHERE A.ECP_SEQ = B.ECP_SEQ AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY B.RATE_CD ) SELECT B.RATE_ADSVC_PROD_REL_SEQ ,B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ ,B.RATE_ADSVC_CD ,B.RATE_ADSVC_NM ,B.USE_YN ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_START_DATE ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_END_DATE ,C.GIFT_PRMT_SEQS ,D.EVNT_CD ,D.ECP_SEQ FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_BAS A , NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_PROD_REL B , GIFT_PRMT C , EVENT_PRMT D WHERE A.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ(+) AND B.RATE_ADSVC_CD = C.RATE_CD(+) AND B.RATE_ADSVC_CD = D.RATE_CD(+) AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ, B.RATE_ADSVC_PROD_REL_SEQ

SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.PSTNG_START_DATE AND A.PSTNG_END_DATE THEN A.GIFT_PRICE ELSE 0 END ) + SUM( CASE WHEN A.PSTNG_START_DATE_SEC IS NOT NULL AND A.PSTNG_END_DATE_SEC IS NOT NULL AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.PSTNG_START_DATE_SEC AND A.PSTNG_END_DATE_SEC THEN A.GIFT_PRICE_SEC ELSE 0 END ) AS TOTAL_PRICE FROM NMCP_RATE_GIFT_PRMT A INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC@DL_MSP C ON A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG@DL_MSP B ON A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT@DL_MSP D ON A.PRMT_ID = D.PRMT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND C.RATE_CD = #{rateAdsvcCd} AND A.STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND B.ORGN_ID = '1100011741' AND D.REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'UU'
